assertions.assertion: The method creates a scoped service provider via IServiceScopeFactory.CreateScope() or app.ApplicationServices equivalent
Database.Migrate() is called on both PersistedGrantDbContext and ConfigurationDbContext
assertions.rationale: Calls Database.Migrate() on both PersistedGrantDbContext and ConfigurationDbContext

assertions.assertion: Before seeding clients, a check is performed (e.g. !configContext.Clients.Any()) to avoid duplicate data
Client entities are added using the .ToEntity() extension method to convert from the IdentityServer model to the EF entity
assertions.rationale: Manually constructs entity types instead of using the .ToEntity() extension method from Duende.IdentityServer.EntityFramework.Mappers
